    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    EmployeeController
    Controller for managing employee data, including adding, updating, and deleting employee records.
    InventoryController
    Controller for managing inventory data, including adding, updating, and deleting inventory records.
    MainController
    Main controller for the application, responsible for managing the main content area and switching between different views (e.g., order report, employee management, inventory management).
    MenuController
    Controller for managing menu data, including adding, updating, and deleting menu items.
    OrderReportController
    Controller for generating X and Z reports based on user-selected date and hour.
    OrderStatisticsController
    Controller for generating a sales report based on user-selected date range.
    ProductUsageController
    Controller for generating a product usage report based on user-selected date range.
